title: Resolve navigation coordinate contract mismatch between prompt and mapper
description:
## Council: Deferred to Wave B — approach decision needed

## Evidence
`Agent.Planning/IntentManager.cs` line 91: `if (draft.X is not null && draft.Y is not null && draft.Z is not null)` — requires all three coordinates for `NavigateGoalRequest`. The LLM prompt tells the model to set navigate coordinates to null so the system uses the player's current position.

## Impact
A prompt-following LLM response produces `null` instead of a `NavigateGoalRequest`, so the agent silently does nothing.

## Approach options (pick one before implementing)
(a) **Runtime player-position resolution** (preferred by Data Model Architect) — when coordinates are null, resolve from WorldState.Position. More robust.
(b) **Prompt-only fix** (preferred by Source-Grounded Archivist) — update prompt to always emit explicit coordinates. Less code risk.
(c) **Both** — runtime fallback + prompt clarification.

## Fix (once approach is selected)
1. Implement the chosen approach
2. Update the LLM prompt to match (remove contradictory "leave coords null" instruction)
3. Add tests: navigate intent with null coords → null GoalRequest (regression guard)
4. Add tests: navigate intent with all three coords → NavigateGoalRequest

## Verification
Verified against codebase 2026-06-23. No test coverage for the null-coordinates case. Council: `Data/Pages/council/audit-task-prioritization-council-2026-06-24.md`
